name: 13_system_a_boundary_hwm_equals_cross
description: Branch 3 / System A boundary: safe_hwm EXACTLY equals vwap_cross_hwm_pct. The arm clause uses `>=`, so equality MEETS the condition.
derivation: Outer pass, gate pass. System A: safe_hwm 2.0 >= cross 2.0 is TRUE (`>=` inclusive) AND current_return 0.5 < safe_hwm 2.0 TRUE -> MET. new_vwap_ticks = 0+1 = 1; is_vwap_broken False. System B: current_return 0.5 <= bleed_arm -1.0 FALSE -> bleed reset. Returns (1, 0, False, False). Boundary pin: System A arm clause uses `>=` not `>`.
